descs.desc:
Coin Power +1 for every 6 [Laceration] on target (max 2)
Deal +10% damage for every type of negative effect on target (max 30%)

[StartBattle] On 2 other allied Kurokumo Clan Identities with the fastest Speed: apply 1 [AttackDmgUp] (once per turn)
- If there are 6+ Kurokumo Clan allies, including this unit, apply 2 [AttackDmgUp] to 5 allies instead

If target has 6+ [Laceration], Coin Power +1
[StartBattle] On 2 other allied Kurokumo Clan Identities with the fastest Speed: apply 2 [AttackDmgUp] (once per turn)
- If there are 6+ Kurokumo Clan units, including this unit, apply 3 [AttackDmgUp] to 5 allies instead
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +2 [Laceration] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain 1 [SlashResultUp] next turn (once per turn)

descs.desc:
Coin Power +1 for every 6 [Laceration] on target (max 2)
Deal +10% damage for every type of negative effect on target (max 50%)
[StartBattle] On 2 other allied Kurokumo Clan Identities with the fastest Speed: apply 2 [AttackDmgUp] (once per turn)
- If there are 6+ Kurokumo Clan units, including this unit, apply 4 [AttackDmgUp] to 5 allies instead
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Inflict 1 [SlashTakeDamageUp] (once per turn)
- If there are 6+ Kurokumo Clan units, including this unit, inflict 2 [Vulnerable] instead

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +2 [Laceration] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain 1 [SlashResultUp] next turn (2 times per turn)
[OnSucceedAttack] Activate [Laceration] on target 3 times; then, reduce their [Laceration] Count by 3

descs.desc:
Coin Power +1 for every 6 [Laceration] on target (max 2)
[EnemyKill] Gain 2 [SlashResultUp] next turn (once per turn)
coinDescs:
Deal +10% damage for every type of negative effect on target (max 100%)
[OnSucceedAttack] Activate [Laceration] on target 3 times; then, reduce their [Laceration] Count by 3

descs.desc:
[StartBattle] Gain 1 [Protection] (once per turn)
[StartBattle] On (2 + highest Reson.) allied Kurokumo Clan Identities, including this unit, with the fastest Speed: apply 2 [Endurance] (once per turn)

1081101.name: Gathering Dark Clouds
1081101.desc:
Combat Start: if there are 2+ allied Kurokumo Clan Identities in this Encounter, including this unit, gain 1 [BlackCloudBlade]

Combat Start: apply 1 [BlackCloud] to Kurokumo Clan Identities adjacent to this unit on the Dashboard

1081102.name: Battle Ready
1081102.desc:
When a Kurokumo Clan ally dies, gain 1 [SlashResultUp] for this Encounter

When 3 or more Kurokumo Clan allies are defeated, gain [EngageToBattle] for this Encounter

1081111.name: Gathering Dark Clouds
1081111.desc:
Combat Start: if there are 2+ allied Kurokumo Clan Identities in this Encounter, including this unit, gain 1 [BlackCloudBlade]

Combat Start: apply 1 [BlackCloud] to Kurokumo Clan Identities adjacent to this unit on the Dashboard
- At 4+ Lust Reson., apply 1 [BlackCloud] to all other Kurokumo Clan allies

1081121.name: Cloud Workshop Blade
1081121.desc: 1 ally with the fastest Speed inflicts +1 more [Laceration] Potency or Count with Skill and Coin effects against enemies
